name: Nantong Xingqiu Graphite Co., Ltd.
summary: Nantong Xingqiu Graphite Co., Ltd. is a China-based company specializing in the production and sales of graphite products. Their products are used in various industries, including lithium-ion batteries, metallurgy, and friction materials. Nantong Xingqiu Graphite Co., Ltd. is headquartered in China.
